arts.ttl: West Ham v Leicester: All you need to know
arts.sum: West Ham United host Leicester City at London Stadium this Thursday night, as the Hammers look to build on their impressive win at Arsenal and address their recent struggles at home. West Ham currently sit 16th in the Premier League with 30 points, following their 1-0 victory over Arsenal at Emirates Stadium.

arts.ttl: “Makes sense” | West Ham interested in England defender Harwood-Bellis
arts.sum: West Ham United could make a move for Southampton defender Taylor Harwood-Bellis in the summer as Graham Potter looks for defensive reinforcements. arts.ttl: Graham Potter Wants 'Incredible' Star, His Agent is 'Close' to West Ham

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy takes harsher stance over Mads Hermansen and Boubakary Soumare incident
arts.sum: Leicester City players must put on a united front and cannot be seen publicly at loggerheads, manager Ruud van Nistelrooy urged. Straight after the game, van Nistelrooy said it was not a problem, as it showed the players care.

arts.ttl: West Ham vs Leicester – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: West Ham United entertain Leicester City in the Premier League this evening. The two teams head into the clash in contrasting mood. West Ham earned a 1-0 win at Arsenal at the weekend in their best performance under new head coach Graham Potter. Despite a disappointing campaign, the Hammers have optimism ahead of the run-in. arts.sum: West Ham tonight take on Leicester City as we look to build on the win over Arsenal. arts.ttl: President will ‘do everything possible’ to sign West Ham player – Manager keen on transfer
arts.sum: Guido Rodríguez was linked with a move away from West Ham United in January, but no deal took shape. The Hammers took Rodríguez on a free transfer last summer and he played over 1,000 minutes from 20 matches. He lost prominence during Julen Lopetegui’s final weeks at the club.
